title: Day 2 — ChronoVerse planning and quizwhiz dev

title: Day 1 — Portfolio config and Git push
notes: Worked on personal portfolio site jeet.dev, editing the profile.js configuration file to update identity settings. Pushed changes via git and used Docker for local development. Also explored Web3Forms integration.
